tests_added: tests/test_history_fixes.py (updated with corrected mocks and resolution tests)
design_decisions: Corrected refresh-failure tests to mock `refresh_statuses()` instead of `get_games()`, ensuring they actually verify decoupled backup success.
Switched history timestamps to ISO 8601 with microsecond resolution to handle same-second operations reliably and enable string-based sorting.
Updated frontend to robustly parse both ISO and space-separated timestamps and hide microseconds for display.
Removed `time.sleep()` from tests, relying on microsecond resolution for deterministic sorting.
results: All 149 tests passing. Backend and frontend hardened against collisions and invalid triggers. Decoupled backup/refresh logic is verified by corrected tests.
